Carter discovers a massive Apache camp on a plateau. Instead of retreating, he launches a violent, sudden charge with his revolvers, causing mass confusion among the five hundred warriors.
From suspense to explosive violence and chaos.

Total chaos and mass confusion within the camp.
A sudden, violent charge using revolvers to disrupt the camp.
